regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Christchurch typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Canterbury rates are near the national average; post-earthquake rebuild experience is common across local trades. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
